productDisplayName: Globalite Men Black & Grey Eclipse Shoes
description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee and up your style quotient. Product DetailsBlack and grey slip on with central lace-ups, overlays and perforations Foamy globalite midsoleTPU outsole with arched midfoot and patterned lugs Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
